ApiKeyTestResult.description: Result of testing an API key for a remote backend.
ApiKeyTestResult.title: ApiKeyTestResult

AutoTuneVramRequest.description:
Request body for ``POST /api/training/auto-tune-vram``.

All fields are optional. When the hardware fields are omitted the
backend queries ``GpuInfo`` for VRAM and ``psutil.virtual_memory()``
for host RAM. Supplying them explicitly is the entry point the
Stage F smoke script uses to simulate a smaller card on the 5090.

profile.description: Training profile to tune for. The image profile (frames=1) and video profile (121 frames) have different VRAM curves and therefore different tier tables. Defaults to 'video' to match TrainingConfig.profile.
profile.title: Profile

system_ram_bytes.description: Override the detected host RAM in bytes. Mostly useful in tests.
system_ram_bytes.title: System Ram Bytes

vram_bytes.description: Override the detected GPU VRAM in bytes. Used by the Stage F smoke script to simulate a 24/20/16 GB card on a real 32 GB 5090.
vram_bytes.title: Vram Bytes

AutoTuneVramRequest.title: AutoTuneVramRequest

AutoTuneVramResponse.description:
One row of the feasibility table returned to the Training UI.

Mirrors ``training_worker.engine.gpu_budget.LowVramRecommendation``
one-to-one. The frontend renders ``tier_label`` and ``warning``
verbatim and binds the three knob fields to the start-job form.
AutoTuneVramResponse.title: AutoTuneVramResponse

BackendDescriptor.description: Describes a captioning backend and whether it is ready to use.
BackendDescriptor.title: BackendDescriptor

default.system_prompt: You are a video annotation assistant. Describe the subject, action, framing, expression, and setting in one to three sentences. Use video terminology (e.g., "shot", "footage"). Do not use words like "photograph" or "still". Do not invent details not visible in the frames. Begin directly with the subject. Do not open the caption with a preamble such as "The video clip features", "This video shows", "The image depicts", or any similar framing phrase.

CaptionBatchStatus.description: Status of a batch captioning job.
CaptionBatchStatus.title: CaptionBatchStatus

default.system_prompt: You are a video annotation assistant. Describe the subject, action, framing, expression, and setting in one to three sentences. Use video terminology (e.g., "shot", "footage"). Do not use words like "photograph" or "still". Do not invent details not visible in the frames. Begin directly with the subject. Do not open the caption with a preamble such as "The video clip features", "This video shows", "The image depicts", or any similar framing phrase.

VramSweepCellResponse.description:
One measured cell of the VRAM benchmark sweep.

Mirrors ``training_worker.engine.vram_sweep_data.VramSweepCell``.
The Training UI renders the full list as a sortable table so the
operator can pick any (quant, blocks_resident) combination, not
just the auto-tune recommendation.
VramSweepCellResponse.title: VramSweepCellResponse

VramSweepResponse.description: The full measured VRAM sweep plus provenance for the UI.
VramSweepResponse.title: VramSweepResponse

get.description:
Live used / total VRAM (MB) for one GPU index.

Polled by the Monitor view so the operator can watch VRAM climb,
e.g. during sample generation where the run is prone to OOM.

schema.title: Response Route Download Progress Api Models Download Progress Get
Response Route Ltx Recommendation Api Models Ltx Recommendation Get
Response Route Shutdown Api System Shutdown Post

post.description:
Recommend a low-VRAM tier for the detected GPU + host RAM.

Stage F (per ``memory-bank/feature_real_training.md``). The
response mirrors one row of the feasibility table and the
Training tab binds the three knob fields verbatim.

schema.title: Response Route List Jobs Api Training Jobs Get

delete.description: Delete a terminal-state job. Errors if the job is still active.

schema.title: Response Route Delete Job Api Training Jobs  Job Id  Delete
Response Route Get Job Api Training Jobs  Job Id  Get
Response Route List Checkpoints Api Training Jobs  Job Id  Checkpoints Get

post.description: Spawn a new job using the same config as an existing one.

schema.title: Response Route List Samples Api Training Jobs  Job Id  Samples Get
Response Route List Presets Api Training Presets Get

get.description:
Return the full measured VRAM benchmark sweep.

The Training tab renders every measured (profile, quant,
blocks_resident) cell as a sortable table so the operator can
pick any combination, not just the auto-tune recommendation.
The data is static (transcribed from the master sweep).

schema.title: Response Route List History Api Verification History  Project Id  Get
Response Route Get Job Status Api Verification Jobs  Generation Id  Get
Response Route Cancel Api Verification Jobs  Generation Id  Cancel Post
Response Route List Loras Api Verification Loras Get
